net_summary: The two pages have distinct design and layout changes, making them difficult to directly compare in terms of improvement or regression.

differences.before: Dark gray background with white text and a prominent search bar
differences.after: White background with yellow and blue accents and a less prominent search bar
differences.ux_impact: No clear impact on user experience

differences.before: Centered in the top navigation bar
differences.after: Aligned to the left in the top navigation bar
differences.ux_impact: No clear impact on user experience

differences.before: Pink background with product categories and images
differences.after: White background with promotional banners and product images
differences.ux_impact: No clear impact on user experience

differences.before: Multiple categories with images and text
differences.after: Fewer categories with images and text
differences.ux_impact: No clear impact on user experience
No clear impact on user experience

differences.after: Fewer items with icons and text
